text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Check it out, Grass! I'm lookin' as ripped as a
wrestler!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Oh wow, you really are. You've been taking your
weight lifting seriously.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Sí! I think I've been shapin' up nicely!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I gotta keep my body tuned if I'm gonna get hella
fast!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Yes, I'm really glad your diet has been going well.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
D-d-diet... Who said anything about a diet?
...Hahaha!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, silly me. It's not like you would ever
overindulged on limited-time-only omelets and
gain too much weight.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Oops, it's just about time for my die—I mean,
weight lifting! See ya!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Through dieting... or weight lifting rather, El
Condor Pasa has successfully lost some weight.
